_comment: Example reference file showing what each mission flag does.

_top_level_notes.character: Name of the character this file belongs to.

_mission_notes.mission_id: Unique mission ID. Keep it unique. Example: example_001
_mission_notes.name: Mission title shown in selector.
_mission_notes.setup_debug_flags: Training/debug values automatically applied while this mission is active.
_mission_notes.goal: Optional alternate clear condition instead of steps.

setup_debug_flags._CpuAction_note: CPU behavior preset. Common values: 0 idle, 2 stand, 4 corner/facing setup (depends on mapped game values).
setup_debug_flags._CpuGuard_note: Guard setting. Common values: 0 no guard, 1 conditional guard, 2 always guard.
setup_debug_flags._P1Meter_note: Sets Player 1 meter amount or refill state used by the tool.

steps._note: Any listed label can satisfy this step.

steps.label: Baroque cancel
steps._note: pass=true means the step clears immediately when detected. No hit or damage required. Best for cancels, movement, jump cancel, Baroque, install activations, etc.

steps.label: j.B
steps._note: grace=10 gives a temporary leniency window after this step clears. Helps links, landings, delayed followups, or brief drops in combo state.

steps.label: Jump Cancel
steps._note: pass and grace can be combined. Auto-clear the cancel, then allow a short follow-up window.

steps.label: Zombie Grab B
steps._note: grace_keeps_alive_only=true means the grace window only prevents mission reset. It does NOT help auto-confirm the next step. Useful for blocked command grabs, fake pressure resets, or situations where the next move must still connect on its own.

goal._target_state_note: State to track for state_duration missions.
goal._frames_note: How long target state must be maintained.
